description_long: This is a sprawling, single-story bungalow with a modern architectural style, featuring a low-pitched, multi-section hip roof clad in reddish-brown tiles. The structure is arranged in an L-shape, with large glass windows and sliding doors along the main facades, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. A covered carport is attached to one end, connected by a sheltered walkway, and there is a visible porch area with steps leading up to the entrance. The exterior walls appear to be a mix of light-colored stone or concrete and wood paneling, giving the building a contemporary yet warm appearance. The property is set on a rectangular grassy plot, with paved walkways leading to the main entrance and carport. The overall design emphasizes open, horizontal lines and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story L-shaped bungalow with a hip roof, large glass windows, and a covered carport, set on a grassy plot with paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, and the covered carport connected by a walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated L-shape, the hip roof sections, and the carport at the far end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the bungalow, the porch area with steps, and extensive glass doors.
description_view_3: Angled back view focusing on the porch, the intersection of the L-shape, and the carport structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
